title: Dumbelled
description: Replaces the mace with a dumbell!
body:
Have you gotten tired of the Mace?
Have you ever wished that the Mace was a Dumbell?
Well now you got it.

This resource pack replaces the Mace with a Dumbell!

Now you can stylishly kill people with gym equipment

![dumbell stack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ac958da17fde06af40d9aef99409c4466247fc9.png)
